title: MDCAT Biology Cell Structure Class
teacherNotes: Keep the class visual and function-based. Ask students to explain organelle function before choosing an MCQ option.
homework: Attempt MDCAT Week 1 Assignment and add two wrong answers to the error log.
followUpText: Today we studied MDCAT Biology cell structure. Please revise organelle functions, complete the assigned worksheet and attempt the Week 1 assignment.

title: FAST Quant Percentages Speed Class
teacherNotes: Force students to write original, change and final value before solving. This quickly exposes the base-value mistake.
homework: Complete FAST Quant Speed Assignment and revise the percentage formulas in the formula bank.
followUpText: Today we practised FAST percentage questions. Revise the base-value method, complete the worksheet and submit the speed assignment.

title: GAT Analytical Assumptions Class
teacherNotes: Train students to separate evidence, conclusion and hidden assumption. Discourage answer choices that are true but unnecessary.
homework: Attempt the NAT/GAT mixed reasoning assignment and write one assumption error in the error log.
followUpText: Today we studied assumptions in reasoning. Revise evidence-conclusion links and complete the assigned reasoning practice.
